meaning: n.刺痛,痛苦adj.巧妙的,聪明的,漂亮的,潇洒的,刺痛的,剧烈的,厉害的,敏捷的vi.刺痛,懊恼 轻快地,严厉地,灵巧地,精确的,时髦地,大大的
examples: She mixes with the smart set.
She's just as smart as her sister.
He's no rube. He's a very smart guy.
For an awful lot of people, paying now is the smart thing to do.
Murphy was heard muttering his famous phrase and his smart project manager wrote it down.
